description: Wrap the Phase 1 cocotb simulation layer in a FastAPI web service with REST API endpoints for running simulations, serving test templates, and downloading VCD waveforms.

userStories.title: FastAPI Project Skeleton
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a properly structured FastAPI project with dependencies so that I can start building API endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/app/main.py creates a FastAPI app with CORS middleware (allow all origins for dev)
backend/requirements.txt includes fastapi, uvicorn, and any other dependencies
GET /api/health returns {"status": "ok"}
App can be started with `uvicorn app.main:app` from the backend/ directory
Typecheck passes

sharedFiles.reason: Created here, later stories register routes/lifespan

userStories.notes: File structure: backend/app/main.py (FastAPI app, CORS, lifespan), backend/app/routes/simulation.py (route handlers), backend/app/services/ (runner.py, waveform.py). CORS should allow all origins for dev.

userStories.title: Simulation Service — Core Execution
userStories.description: As a backend service, I want to invoke the Phase 1 test runner as a subprocess so that API requests trigger real simulations.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/app/services/runner.py contains a SimulationService class
run_simulation(steps: list[dict]) method executes test_runner.py via asyncio.create_subprocess_exec
Steps are passed via a temp JSON file (not env var)
Result JSON is read back from the temp file written by test_runner
Returns a structured dict with passed, steps, register_dump, vcd_path
Simulation timeout of 60 seconds (configurable); raises TimeoutError on expiry
Temp files (input JSON, result JSON) are cleaned up after execution
Typecheck passes

sharedFiles.reason: Created here, US-003 and US-004 modify it

userStories.notes: Use asyncio.create_subprocess_exec (not subprocess.run) to avoid blocking the event loop. Path resolution: SimulationService needs path to test_runner.py and RTL sources relative to backend/sim/ directory.

userStories.title: Build Caching (Hybrid Compile)
userStories.description: As a backend service, I want to cache the compiled Verilog binary and only recompile when RTL files change, so that repeated simulations are faster.
acceptanceCriteria: SimulationService checks mtime of all RTL source files against a stored timestamp
If no RTL file has changed since last compile, skip the compile step and reuse existing sim_build/ binary
If any RTL file changed, trigger a fresh compile before running
First run always compiles
Cache state is stored in memory (no persistence file needed)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Cache state in memory — recompile on server restart is acceptable. Check mtime of all .v files in RTL source directory.

userStories.title: Request Queue (Single Concurrency)
userStories.description: As a backend service, I want to serialize simulation requests so that only one simulation runs at a time, preventing resource contention.
acceptanceCriteria: An asyncio.Lock guards the simulation execution path
Concurrent requests wait in FIFO order (asyncio.Lock default behavior)
If a request waits longer than 120 seconds for the lock, it returns HTTP 503 with a clear message
The lock is released even if the simulation fails or times out
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use asyncio.wait_for with 120s timeout on lock acquisition. Ensure lock release in finally block.

userStories.title: POST /api/run — Execute Simulation
userStories.description: As an API consumer, I want to POST a JSON test sequence and receive the simulation results so that I can validate I2C behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/run accepts a JSON body with a steps array (same format as Phase 1 JSON files)
Request body is validated: steps must be a non-empty list, each step must have a valid op
On success, returns HTTP 200 with the full result dict (passed, steps, register_dump, waveform_id)
waveform_id is a UUID string that can be used with GET /api/waveform/:id
On validation error, returns HTTP 422 with a descriptive error message
On simulation failure (timeout, crash), returns HTTP 500 with error details
On queue full/timeout, returns HTTP 503
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Wire together SimulationService (with queue lock) and WaveformService. After simulation, copy VCD to waveform storage with UUID name. Return waveform_id in response.

userStories.title: GET /api/templates — List Test Templates
userStories.description: As an API consumer, I want to list available test templates so that I can quickly run pre-built test sequences.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/templates returns a JSON array of template objects
Each template object has: id (filename without extension), name (from JSON metadata or filename), description (from JSON metadata or empty), step_count (number of steps)
Templates are loaded from backend/sim/templates/*.json (the Phase 1 template files)
Response is cached in memory (reloaded on restart)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Load templates from backend/sim/templates/*.json. Cache the template list in memory on first access.

userStories.title: GET /api/templates/:id — Get Template Detail
userStories.description: As an API consumer, I want to fetch a specific template's full content so that I can inspect or submit it to /api/run.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/templates/{template_id} returns the full JSON content of the template file
Returns HTTP 404 if the template ID does not match any file
Response includes the steps array ready to be submitted to POST /api/run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: GET /api/waveform/:id — Download VCD
userStories.description: As an API consumer, I want to download the VCD waveform file from a simulation run so that I can view it in a waveform viewer.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/waveform/{waveform_id} returns the VCD file as application/octet-stream with Content-Disposition: attachment
Returns HTTP 404 if the waveform ID does not exist or has expired
VCD files are stored in a temp directory with UUID-based naming
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use FastAPI FileResponse with media_type='application/octet-stream'. Validate UUID format to prevent path traversal.

userStories.title: VCD Storage & TTL Cleanup
userStories.description: As a backend service, I want VCD files to be automatically cleaned up after a TTL period so that disk space is not wasted.
acceptanceCriteria: VCD files are stored in a configurable temp directory (default: system temp dir / i2c-sim-waveforms/)
Each simulation run creates a VCD file named {uuid}.vcd
A background task runs every 5 minutes to delete VCD files older than 30 minutes
The background task starts with the FastAPI app lifecycle (startup event)
TTL is configurable via environment variable VCD_TTL_MINUTES (default: 30)
Typecheck passes

sharedFiles.reason: Register lifespan/startup event for cleanup task

userStories.notes: Create backend/app/services/waveform.py for VCD storage and cleanup logic. Use FastAPI lifespan context manager for the background cleanup task.

userStories.title: End-to-End Integration Test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests that verify the full API flow so that I can confidently deploy.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file at backend/tests/test_api.py using httpx.AsyncClient with FastAPI's TestClient
Test: POST /api/run with a simple write+read sequence returns passed: true
Test: POST /api/run with invalid steps returns HTTP 422
Test: GET /api/templates returns a non-empty list
Test: GET /api/templates/{id} returns valid template content
Test: GET /api/waveform/{id} with valid ID returns a VCD file
Test: GET /api/waveform/{id} with invalid ID returns 404
Test: GET /api/health returns 200
Tests can run without iverilog installed (mock the subprocess call)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Mock asyncio.create_subprocess_exec to avoid needing iverilog/cocotb. Use httpx.AsyncClient for async test support.
